summary: Iteration 23: Verified 7 bug fixes from review request. Backend 8/8 tests PASS. Frontend critical fixes confirmed: Blog page no longer crashes with createSafeMarkup (0 JS errors on /blog and /blog/:slug), Blog Manager link is visible in Content sidebar menu, Visual Editor has dark background (rgb(26,26,36)), Access Requests endpoint works, Contact submissions have type='contact', Granular Permissions API endpoints respond correctly. Navigation Manager route loads (path is /dashboard/navigation-menu per sidebar, not /navigation-manager).
action_items: Confirm the intended route path for Navigation Manager: sidebar entry is 'Navigation Menu' which resolves to /dashboard/navigation-menu; the review request referenced /dashboard/navigation-manager. Align docs/links.
critical_code_review_comments: Granular permissions router is mounted at /api/permissions/granular not /api/granular-permissions. If frontend GranularPermissionsManager calls /api/granular-permissions it will 404 - verify frontend uses /api/permissions/granular/{available,user/:id,grant,revoke}.

Contact 'type' field is correctly persisted as 'contact' for public POST /api/contact. Ensure access-requests router writes type='access_request' to support accurate registration separation (not verified here).

success_rate.frontend: Verified: Blog pages no crash, Blog Manager sidebar link present, Quill dark bg rgb(26,26,36), login works, 0 JS errors

seed_data_creation: TEST_contact_* submission created via /api/contact; TEST_ar_* access request created via /api/access-requests. Persisted but not cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 review-request bugs verified fixed. Backend endpoints: access-requests at /api/access-requests, granular permissions at /api/permissions/granular/* (NOT /api/granular-permissions), contact at /api/contact with GET /api/contact/submissions. Next agent: main agent should self-verify the Navigation Manager drag-drop reorder + toggle inside the authenticated sidebar (route appears as 'Navigation Menu'). Dashboard loads cleanly after login.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no regressions found in this iteration.
